["I am Osiris, the lord of eternity, who rules the underworld.","I have traversed the dark rivers of the Duat to reach the hall of Ma'at.","My heart has been weighed against the feather of truth and found pure.","Now, I speak the words of power to open the golden gates of the east.","Let the sun god Ra arise and cast his eternal light upon the sands."]

Walk the path of creation: Drink from the river (🌊), bask in the solar fire (☉), ascend to the celestial star (⭐), receive the wisdom of the serpent (𓆗), and finally stand upon the eternal mountain (⛰️).
The hunt begins under the silver moon (☽). The silent owl (𓅓) watches from above, as the sacred cat (𓃠) stalks through the temple shadows.
Balance the primal elements: Quench the earth with the river (🌊), ignite the sacred fire (🔥), shape the mighty mountain (⛰️), and rise to meet the eternal sun (☉).
The golden sun (☉) rises high, followed by the flight of the solar owl (𓅓) as it ascends to the highest star (⭐).
The serpent (𓆗) crawls through the hot ashes of the fire (🔥), slides into the cool waters (🌊), and rests beneath the crescent moon (☽).
The earth mountain (⛰️) cracks open with volcanic fire (🔥), before it is cooled by the waters (🌊) of the Nile.
First shines the distant star (⭐) beside the shining moon (☽). The cat (𓃠) leaps, guided by the silent flight of the owl (𓅓).
Combine the cosmos: Ignite the flames (🔥), pour the river (🌊), align the golden sun (☉) with the silver moon (☽), and invoke the eternal star (⭐).
The guardian owl (𓅓) speaks to the royal cobra (𓆗). The sacred cat (𓃠) guides the spirit to the tombs of the eternal mountain (⛰️).
